title: Shon Kon Ray

{{Quote|Message from Master ''Shon Kon Ray'' to Master ''Plo Koon''. We have been ''grossly'' misinformed. The Rebel forces are not napping, but wide awake and butchering us.|Shon Kon Ray|<ref name="Ti" />}}
'''Shon Kon Ray''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Five [[Standard month/Legends|months]] into the war, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Battle of Brentaal IV (Clone Wars)|invaded]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]] when clan leader [[Shogar Tok]], who was allied with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], caused the local populace to rebel against the Republic. Kon Ray and fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Generals [[Agen Kolar/Legends|Agen Kolar]] and [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]] led the invasion force, while Master [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] commanded the [[Republic Navy/Legends|naval]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]. However, the Brentaal rebels repelled the majority of the Republic [[Troop/Legends|troops]] with their [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielded]] [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]]. While Kon Ray was aboard a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i gunship]], he sent a message to Koon informing him of the situation, suggesting a withdrawal from the planet. As Kon Ray finished his report, his gunship was destroyed by enemy [[Laser/Legends|fire]], [[Death/Legends|killing]] the Jedi Master in the process.

==Biography==
{{Quote|In short, the attack is ''botched''. Perhaps we should ''withdraw''—if we still can. I'm open to other suggestions… Kon Ray out—|Kon Ray's final words|<ref name="Ti" />}}
Shon Kon Ray, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], was born during the final [[Time/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually rising to the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]].<ref name="Ti" /> When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] were [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|initiated]]<ref name="AOTC">{{Film|II}}</ref> in [[22 BBY/Legends|21.6 BBY]], Kon Ray led the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]].<ref name="NEC: TBOB" />

[[File:TheDeathofShonKonRay.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Shon Kon Ray's LAAT/i is shot down.]]
Five [[Standard month/Legends|months]] into the Clone Wars, the Republic [[Battle of Brentaal IV (Clone Wars)|assaulted]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]] when [[Shogar Tok]], a clan leader who joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]], incited the local population to rebel against the Republic. Kon Ray led the invasion force, along with fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Masters [[Agen Kolar/Legends|Agen Kolar]] and [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]].<ref name="NEC: TBOB" /> However, the Brentaal resistance fighters fought back against the majority of the Republic [[Troop/Legends|troops]] with their [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], which were fully [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielded]]. While he was aboard a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i gunship]], Kon Ray sent a message to Jedi Master [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]]—who was placed in charge of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|naval]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]—informing him of the situation on the planet. In the message, Kon Ray suggested that the Republic forces retreat from the planet, although he was willing to consider any recommendations Koon had to offer. Kon Ray's [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was destroyed after the Jedi Master finished his report, [[Death/Legends|ending]] his life.<ref name="Ti" />

==Personality and traits==
The Human male Shon Kon Ray had light skin and blond hair. During the Republic's assault of Brentaal IV, he advised Plo Koon that a withdrawal from the planet was necessary, but was willing to listen to other suggestions.<ref name="Ti" />

==Equipment==
Shon Kon Ray wore a set of [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi robes]].<ref name="Ti" />

==Behind the scenes==
Shon Kon Ray was created for the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] ''[[Jedi: Shaak Ti]]'', written by [[John Ostrander]] and illustrated by [[Jan Duursema]].<ref name="Ti" /> The comic was published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[May 14]], [[2003]].<ref name="DH">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/12-375/Star-Wars-Jedi----Shaak-Ti|text=STAR WARS: JEDI -- SHAAK TI}}</ref> Ostrander speculated that Kon Ray was born in [[75 BBY]].<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/21973967|board=Literature|thread=Getting to know the EU Jedi (John, Jan, Davide, Randy--feel free to help!)|user=[[John Ostrander|jfostrander]]|date=2005-10-17|time=8:43 AM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20180622020335/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/getting-to-know-the-eu-jedi-john-jan-davide-randy-feel-free-to-help.21960714}}</ref> When [[Kyle Jewhurst]] created the [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolan]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Nem Bees]] through [[StarWars.com]]'s "[[What's The Story?]]" feature, Kon Ray was originally intended to have been Bees' Jedi Master. However, the reference was cut during the editorial process.<ref name="Bees">{{Blog|lordhydronium|1|Tales of a Jedi: The Creation of Nem Bees}}</ref> Ostrander later confirmed that the Jedi's name references the famous actor [[Wikipedia:Sean Connery|Sean Connery]].<ref name="ComicMix">{{WebCite|url=https://www.comicmix.com/tag/shon-kon-ray|text=John Ostrander: Star Wars Annotations|date=2017-01-08|quote=I named a character after a good friend, I had prisoners being pressed into service on an impossible mission a la Suicide Squad, and I created a Jedi based on Sean Connery.|archivedate=20220219173942}}</ref>
